name: LingBot-World — AI World Simulation & Video Generation
description: Integrates LingBot-World from Robbyant into HoC. Citizens can generate interactive world simulation videos from an image + prompt, with optional camera path control. Auto-clones the repo and auto-installs dependencies — zero user configuration required.

requirements.notes: Auto-clones repo, auto-installs requirements.txt via pip, auto-downloads model from HuggingFace. Requires CUDA GPU (8GB+ for NF4 quantized, 80GB+ for full precision multi-GPU).
